$comment: D-CSUBSET-VLA C1b: the runtime witness that a function-scope variable-length array (`int a[n]`, runtime n) RUNS on every leg. The baseline arm proves the dynamic-alloca codegen (aligned `sub sp,<reg>` + the conditional frame pointer + the fixed-frame SP->FP base-switch); the arm64 leg is the load-bearing proof of the extended-register SUB-sp encoding (reg31=SP, not XZR) that a byte pin alone cannot witness. The `release` arm proves the VLA survives the full optimizer (the side-effecting Alloca + size producer are never dropped, and Mem2Reg-promoted locals that spill reload off the frame pointer, not the moved SP). exitCode 42 = a[5]=35 + a[1]=7.
